local function z(z)return Z[z-(-676492-(-733308))]end do local z=table.insert local return(function(Z,J,V,r,A,Q,M,b,w,Y,n,f,h,X,C,x,T,P,l,m,e,a)P,e,Y,l,f,x,n,X,T,b,m,h,C,a,w=function(Z,z)local J=w(z)local V=function(V,r,A,Q,M)return X(Z,{V,r;A,Q;M},z,J)end return V
